allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); item=data[0]; print\('keys:', list\(item.keys\(\)\)[:15]\); comps=item.get\('components',[]\); print\('components count:', len\(comps\)\); print\('first comp keys:', list\(comps[0].keys\(\)\) if comps else 'none'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) item=data[0] print\('parent uniqueName:', item['uniqueName']\) print\('parent name:', item['name']\) for c in item.get\('components',[]\): print\(' comp:', c.get\('uniqueName'\), '|', c.get\('name'\), '| count:', c.get\('itemCount'\)\) ")
